name: Indeed
description: Largest job board by traffic volume with 250M+ monthly visitors in the US. Strong organic SEO, pay-per-click and sponsored job models. Best for high-volume, hourly, and entry-level hiring.

name: LinkedIn Jobs
description: Highest quality professional candidate pool with 310M+ monthly active professionals. InMail for direct sourcing, detailed professional targeting. Best for professional, executive, and passive candidate search.

name: ZipRecruiter
description: AI matching technology with 25M+ monthly visitors. One-click apply and 100+ partner board distribution. Strong SMB market penetration.

name: Glassdoor
description: Combined job search and employer reviews with 55M+ monthly visitors. Salary transparency builds candidate trust. Integrates with Indeed.

name: Monster
description: Legacy job board with 30M+ monthly visitors. Lower CPC, strong in healthcare and government sectors. Good EMEA presence.

name: CareerBuilder
description: Enterprise-focused job board with 20M+ monthly visitors. Labor market analytics, compliance and background check integrations.

name: Dice
description: Highly targeted tech talent pool with 6M+ monthly visitors. Detailed skills-based matching, strong for contract/freelance tech roles.

name: Google for Jobs
description: Free organic distribution via structured data markup. Billions of Google searches monthly. Aggregates from multiple job boards automatically.

name: StepStone
description: Leading DACH region job board with 18M+ monthly visitors. Strong for professional and engineering roles in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.

name: Totaljobs
description: UK job board with 12M+ monthly visitors. Broad coverage of professional and general roles in the UK market.

name: Reed.co.uk
description: UK job board with 10M+ monthly visitors. Strong for general and temporary staffing roles in the UK.

name: SEEK
description: Leading ANZ job board with 20M+ monthly visitors. Strong for professional, mining, and healthcare roles in Australia and New Zealand.

name: Naukri.com
description: India's largest job board with 80M+ monthly visitors. Strong for IT, engineering, and BPO roles.

name: JobStreet
description: Leading Southeast Asia job board with 25M+ monthly visitors. Strong for general and hospitality roles across SEA markets.

name: Bayt.com
description: Leading MENA job board with 8M+ monthly visitors. Strong for oil/gas, hospitality, and construction roles.

name: Catho
description: Leading Brazil job board with 15M+ monthly visitors. Strong for general and tech roles in the Brazilian market.

name: Handshake
description: Campus recruiting platform with 10M+ monthly visitors. Best for early-career, internships, and university hiring.

name: Wellfound (AngelList)
description: Startup-focused job board with 4M+ monthly visitors. Best for tech, startup, and remote roles.

name: FlexJobs
description: Remote and flexible work job board with 3M+ monthly visitors. Best for remote, flexible, part-time, and freelance roles.

name: USAJobs
description: Federal government job board with 15M+ monthly visitors. Free posting for federal positions. Best for government, military transition, and public sector roles.
